content:
Sagittarius October 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month

Energy Theme Refine the circle, restore the routine
Key Dates Venus retrograde begins Oct 3 / New Moon Oct 10 (Libra, 11th house) / Mercury retrograde begins Oct 24 / Taurus Hunter’s Full Moon Oct 26 (6th house)
Love Venus retrograde in your 12th reviews hidden and unconscious bonds; the 11th house Libra New Moon reopens a friendship-rooted connection
Career 11th house Libra New Moon reopens community, friends, and collective vision; the 6th house Full Moon is a work and health climax
Crystal of the Month Rose Quartz
Lucky Colors Soft rose, warm purple, sunset plum
Lucky Number 11
Affirmation I refine the circle I dream with; I restore the routine that carries me.

This Month’s Energy

Sagittarius, October 2026 refines the circle and restores the routine. The New Moon in Libra on October 10 falls in your 11th house of community, friends, collective vision, and long-term dreams — a fresh start in who you build with. With Venus retrograde from October 3 in your 12th house of closure, rest, and the unconscious, an old hidden bond or unseen pattern returns for review. Then October 26 brings the Hunter’s Full Moon in Taurus, your 6th house of work, routine, and health — a climax around daily systems, wellness, or the back end of your work. Mercury retrograde from October 24 in your 12th house deepens the review of unseen patterns. October’s pattern: refine the circle early, restore the routine late.

Key Dates for Sagittarius in October 2026

Date Transit Meaning for Sagittarius Do / Avoid
Oct 3 Venus retrograde begins in Scorpio 12th house — review closure, rest, hidden bonds, the unconscious through mid-November; an old unseen pattern resurfaces Do: rest, journal, attend to dreams, complete what’s been waiting
Avoid: forcing public action when the depths ask for review
Oct 10 New Moon in Libra 11th house — fresh start in community, friends, collective vision, long-term dreams; with Venus retrograde, an old friendship or collaborative dream returns Do: claim the role in the group, mend the friendship, name the dream
Avoid: forcing a brand-new alliance mid-Venus retrograde
Oct 24 Mercury retrograde begins in Scorpio 12th house — miscommunications and unseen patterns surface; reread the small print and ask the deeper question Do: revisit the dream, journal the pattern, slow the unconscious reflex
Avoid: signing contracts without reading the small print
Oct 26 Hunter’s Full Moon in Taurus 6th house — climax around work, routine, health, daily systems; a long-building wellness or work-rhythm matter matures Do: commit to the routine, organize the systems, address the health
Avoid: pushing the body past its natural pace
Oct 23 Sun enters Scorpio 12th house season — rest, closure, the unconscious through late November; a season for behind-the-scenes work Do: rest, complete, dream, tend to the unseen
Avoid: spreading across too many public commitments
Oct 7 Mars enters Cancer (your 8th) Intimacy, shared resources, psychological depth become action zones through 2027 Do: address the shared finance, renegotiate the intimacy, soften the deep bond
Avoid: power struggles over shared resources

Career & Money

For Sagittarius, October’s career story opens with the collective and culminates in the daily work. The Libra New Moon on October 10 falls in your 11th house of community, friends, and long-term vision — a fresh start in who you build with and what you dream. With Venus retrograde, an old friendship or collaborative project returns for review.

The Taurus Hunter’s Full Moon on October 26 (your 6th house) is the career climax — a long-building daily-work, wellness, or systems matter matures. Mars entering Cancer (your 8th house) on October 7 brings action around shared finance and intimacy through 2027. Crystals for wealth can support the patience; the practical move is refine the circle early, restore the routine late.

Love & Relationships

The Venus retrograde from October 3 in your 12th house of closure and the unconscious is the love signature of the month for Sagittarius: review the hidden bond. An old unseen pattern, an unconscious reflex in love, or a private tie resurfaces for renegotiation through mid-November.

The 11th house Libra New Moon on October 10 reopens friendship-rooted connections — a friend may become more, or a friendship may need renegotiation. The Sun entering Scorpio (your 12th house) on October 23 deepens the rest-and-review season. Crystals for love can support the review; the deeper practice is tending the unseen bond while refining the visible circle.

Health & Wellness

October’s wellness story emphasizes the hips, liver, and daily rhythm. The Taurus Hunter’s Full Moon on October 26 (your 6th house) is the wellness climax — a long-building routine or health matter reaches a turning point. Commit to the sustainable rhythm.

Rose Quartz, your crystal of the month, is traditionally associated with the heart, gentle release, and emotional balance — a useful symbolic companion for a Jupiter-ruled fire sign during a Venus retrograde. Sagittarius often carries tension in the hips, liver, and thighs; gentle hip-opening yoga, warm food, and slow walks are especially helpful. This is lifestyle guidance, not medical advice; persistent concerns belong with a clinician.

Crystal of the Month: Rose Quartz

Why Rose Quartz fits Sagittarius this month. You are Jupiter-ruled — your reflex is expansion, the horizon, the next adventure. October asks the opposite: refine the circle you have, restore the routine that carries you, tend the hidden bond. Rose Quartz — traditionally tied to unconditional love, the heart, and tender release — is the stone that warms the Sagittarius quest into something more intimate. Where Citrine would amplify and Selenite would clarify, Rose Quartz softens. Perfect for the 11th house Libra New Moon (refine the circle) and the 6th house Taurus Full Moon (restore the routine).

How to use it during October 2026. Place Rose Quartz in the center of your workspace or where you meet friends on October 10 (the Libra New Moon). Hold it during any friendship or wellness conversation through October 26.

Best date to use it: October 26, the Taurus Hunter’s Full Moon in your 6th house — hold Rose Quartz at your heart for 5 minutes at moonrise, naming the routine you’re committing to and the circle it serves.

Read more: Rose Quartz Meaning and Best Crystals for Sagittarius.

Monthly Crystal Ritual for Sagittarius — October 2026

When: October 26, the Taurus Hunter’s Full Moon in your 6th house.
Crystal: Rose Quartz.
Intention: Restore the routine; refine the circle it serves.

  1. Cleanse Rose Quartz under cool running water for 30 seconds on the morning of October 10 (the Libra New Moon). Let it sit in the center of your workspace through October 10.
  2. Set the intention between the New Moon and the Full Moon (October 10–26): write down three friends or collaborators you’re refining the dream with — and the routine you’re committing to at the Full Moon.
  3. Act at the Hunter’s Full Moon on October 26: commit to the routine, organize the systems, address the body’s needs. Rose Quartz in your pocket during the act.
  4. Reflect once Venus stations direct in mid-November 2026: how has the circle clarified the routine? Hold Rose Quartz during the review.

Shop Sagittarius Crystals for October 2026

Want to build your monthly crystal toolkit? Explore the full Sagittarius crystal guide for stones connected with love, friendship, daily rhythm, and emotional balance — including the Rose Quartz that warms the quest into intimacy during a Venus retrograde. Every stone is genuine, ethically sourced, and real — not dyed, not glass.

Frequently Asked Questions — Sagittarius October 2026

Is October 2026 a good month for Sagittarius?

It’s a refine-and-restore month. The Libra New Moon on October 10 (your 11th house) reopens community and long-term dreams. The Taurus Hunter’s Full Moon on October 26 (your 6th house) is a work and health climax. Venus retrograde flavors the new beginning with review.

How will the Venus retrograde affect Sagittarius in October 2026?

Venus turns retrograde in your 12th house of closure and the unconscious on October 3. Through mid-November, an old hidden bond, unseen pattern, or private tie resurfaces for review. Rest, journal, attend to dreams.

What does the Taurus Hunter’s Full Moon on October 26 mean for Sagittarius?

It falls in your 6th house of work, routine, and health — a climax around daily systems and wellness. Commit to the routine; organize the systems; address the body’s needs.

What is the best crystal for Sagittarius in October 2026?

Rose Quartz — it warms the quest into intimacy, exactly what an 11th house Libra New Moon (refine the circle) plus a 6th house Taurus Full Moon (restore the routine) demand during a Venus retrograde. See the full Sagittarius crystal guide →

Why does the Sun in Scorpio from October 23 ask Sagittarius to rest?

The Sun’s entry into your 12th house of closure and the unconscious on October 23 opens a season of behind-the-scenes work, completion, and rest through late November — your annual pre-birthday review season.
